Package com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.internal

Class LazyGroup

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.internal.AbstractUserManagementItem
com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.internal.LazyGroup
All Implemented Interfaces:
Lazy, Group, TenantSpecificItem, UserManagementItem, Serializable
public class LazyGroup extends AbstractUserManagementItem implements Group, Lazy

    • getAllUsers

      public Collection<User> getAllUsers(int depth)
      Description copied from interface: Group
      Gets all users associated with this group.

      Walks through the group of group tree upto the given depth and returns all users found in this tree without duplicates.

      Specified by:
      getAllUsers in interface Group
      Parameters:
      depth - of group tree search
      Returns:
      all users of group tree without duplicates
